assertions.title: CLS page loads with stacked area chart

steps.action: Navigate to rum-cls.html with domain/domainkey URL params
steps.expected: CLS dashboard loads and chart renders
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded directly (no login), chart canvas rendered
Page Views, Visits, Bounce Rate, LCP p75, CLS p75, INP p75 all populated

evidence.network: bundles.aem.page resource fetches observed during load (see cwv-views/cls/VAL-CLS-initial-eval.json)

assertions.title: CLS breakdown facets show metric-specific proportions

steps.action: Inspect rendered breakdown rows and stacked bar segments
steps.expected: Breakdown rows include CLS good/needs-improvement/poor proportions
steps.observed: Rows contain bar-ok/bar-4xx/bar-5xx segments with non-zero NI/Poor widths in sampled rows

evidence.network: bundles.aem.page fetches present for breakdown data load (see cwv-views/cls/VAL-CLS-initial-eval.json)

steps.action: Query required facet card IDs in sidebar
steps.observed: 16/16 required facets present (URL, Device Type/OS, Checkpoint, External Referrer, Click targets, Viewmedia, Viewblock, Navigate, Language, Accessibility, Consent, Loadresource, Acquisition, Error, 404, Redirect)

evidence.network: bundles.aem.page requests active during page data population (see cwv-views/cls/VAL-CLS-initial-eval.json)

steps.observed: Filter tag displayed and URL contains filters param

steps.action: Compare metrics and chart state before vs after filter
steps.observed: Page Views changed from 25.44K to 1.10K; chart points changed from 132 to 24

evidence.network: bundles.aem.page requests executed after filter application (resource entries in cwv-views/cls/VAL-CLS-initial-eval.json)

assertions.title: CLS interpolation handles missing CWV data

steps.action: Fetch raw CLS chartData and run interpolateCwvGaps
steps.expected: Sparse interior buckets are interpolated; no visible gaps
steps.observed: 17 sparse-candidate buckets found; sampled buckets changed from rawTotal=0 to interpolated totals >0; noZeroInteriorPointsAfterInterpolation=true

evidence.network: bundles data fetch succeeded for interpolation check (see cwv-views/cls/network-check.json)

assertions.title: CLS chart scrubber shows custom labels

steps.action: Hover chart at points containing NI and poor counts
steps.expected: Scrubber labels use good/needs improvement/poor and not 2xx/4xx/5xx
steps.observed: Combined hovers produced labels good 200, needs improvement 100, poor 100; no legacy 2xx/4xx/5xx labels observed

evidence.network: page remained data-backed by bundles.aem.page while scrubber labels were validated

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests output returned no captured entries in-session despite active data fetches.
frictions.resolution: Used performance resource entries and a direct in-page fetch status check for concrete network evidence.

frictions.description: No single hovered timestamp exposed all three scrubber badges simultaneously because chart points with NI and poor were at different times.
frictions.resolution: Hovered two representative timestamps and combined scrubber label evidence.

summary: Tested 7 CLS assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
